name: hoc/navigation-menu
description: A higher-level site-header navigation HOC that wraps NavigationMenu primitives with responsive mobile drawer behavior, logo placement, and user-action slots. Provides a ready-to-use AppNavigationMenu component combining NavigationMenu, Sidebar, Drawer, and Button primitives. Supports mega-menu content panels, mobile hamburger toggle, and i18n labels via ConfigProvider.
useCases: SaaS marketing sites with product, solutions, pricing, and docs mega-menu headers
Admin platforms requiring a responsive top nav that collapses into a mobile drawer
Documentation sites with version switchers, search triggers, and category flyouts
E-commerce storefronts exposing category panels, promotions, and account links in a unified header
